sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 105:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 105:1
items.html: The two upper vessels are missing in the vessels of the Guf of Nekudim, which are Keter and Hochma, and they only have the phase of ZAT. However, the light that reached them had ten complete Sefirot. Hence, the vessels are small, and therefore broke. (Inner Light, Item 39)
